result: Data cleaning completed successfully. The R script loaded all 9 wave files from data/input/, merged them by NSID using full_join, harmonized missing value codes to standard values (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -1=Not applicable, -3=Not asked), created a consolidated sex variable prioritizing most recent valid responses, and created age-specific sex variables (sex14-sex20, sex32). The cleaned dataset with 16,111 observations and 10 variables was saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
